channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Azacitidine Injection (43598-305-62)
item.description: Azacitidine, Injection, 100 mg (NDC 43598-305-62) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-27 Company: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Inc. Available to existing customers

item.title: Current: Triamcinolone Hexacetonide Injection (59137-570-01)
item.description: Hexatrione, Injection, 40 mg/2 mL (NDC 59137-570-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-27 Company: Medexus Estimated recovery: TBD

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Dehydrated Alcohol Injection, Solution (16729-710-45)
item.description: Dehydrated Alcohol, Injection, Solution, 1 mL/1 mL (10 pack) (NDC 16729-710-45) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-05-27 Company: Accord Healthcare Inc. Accord is transitioning to the 5-pack configuration (NDC 16729-710-53).

item.title: Current: Amphetamine Aspartate Monohydrate, Amphetamine Sulfate, Dextroamphetamine Saccharate, Dextroamphetamine Sulfate Tablet (0185-0842-01)
item.description: Amphetamine Aspartate Monohydrate, Amphetamine Sulfate, Dextroamphetamine Saccharate, Dextroamphetamine Sulfate, Tablet, 2.5 mg; 2.5 mg; 2.5 mg; 2.5 mg (NDC 0185-0842-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-26 Company: Sandoz Inc.

item.description: Amphetamine Aspartate Monohydrate, Amphetamine Sulfate, Dextroamphetamine Saccharate, Dextroamphetamine Sulfate, Tablet, 7.5 mg; 7.5 mg; 7.5 mg; 7.5 mg (NDC 0185-2099-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-26 Company: Sandoz Inc. Estimated recovery: 2 weeks

item.title: Current: Hydroxocobalamin Injection (50633-310-11)
item.description: Cyanokit, Injection, 5 g/250mL (NDC 50633-310-11) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-26 Company: BTG International Inc. Cyanokit is available to order. To address the drug shortage, BTG International Inc (a SERB Pharmaceuticals company) coordinated with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to make the following impacted batches available to U.S. patients during this period of shortage.
